name: What proof do I need for my forklift injury claim at work?
description: Scene photos, medical records, witnesses, video, maintenance/OSHA logs, incident report.

mainEntity.name: What proof do I need for my forklift injury claim at work?

acceptedAnswer.text: Scene photos, medical records, witnesses, video, maintenance/OSHA logs, incident report.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Photos of scene/forklift damage, witness statements, medical records, incident report, surveillance video, OSHA logs.** These prove negligence and causation.[1][6] Key factors: Operator training records, maintenance logs showing defects; expert testimony on standards.[4] Pre-existing issues need doctor linkage to accident. Secure evidence before employer discards. Attorney subpoenas records for strong claim.
